metadata.description: A virtual engineering team for solo founders — core skills (plan review, code review, automation pipelines, GTM, writing) plus modular stack experts (iOS, Android, Next.js, Python, LLM). Install what you need.

plugins.name: solopreneur-core
plugins.description: Core skills and the designer agent — plan review, code review loops, backlog management, GTM, writing, and thinking partners.

plugins.name: solopreneur-ios
plugins.description: iOS/macOS SwiftUI expertise — ios-dev agent and ios-patterns skill. Depends on solopreneur-core.

plugins.name: solopreneur-android
plugins.description: Android/Kotlin expertise — android-dev agent and android-patterns skill. Depends on solopreneur-core.

plugins.name: solopreneur-nextjs
plugins.description: Next.js/React/frontend expertise — nextjs-dev agent. Depends on solopreneur-core.

plugins.name: solopreneur-python
plugins.description: Python/FastAPI/LangGraph expertise — python-dev agent. Depends on solopreneur-core.

plugins.name: solopreneur-llm
plugins.description: LLM/LangGraph agent development expertise — llm-dev agent. Depends on solopreneur-core.
